appliedUpdates.description: Documented the rerun setup for password-reset validation: forgot-password now returns 200, reset links are emitted in the API log, and the logged token should be exercised through the local /reset-password route because the direct Better Auth reset URL returned an Internal Server Error during local validation.
Documented the authenticated POST /api/dev/seed-analyzed-interview helper used to seed analyzed interview data for VAL-DATA-007 setup.
